title: Flamingo - Software update for headset and charge case
scenario: DFU update for both headset and charge case can be initiated via "Update All" button from device home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate the device card for the connected Poly headset and charge case.
3. Tap the 'Update All' button displayed on the Home screen.
4. Wait for the software update (DFU) process to complete for both the headset and the charge case.
5. After the update finishes, verify the firmware version displayed for the headset and charge case on the Home screen or Device Settings screen.
expected: Both the headset and charge case successfully complete the DFU process and are updated to the latest firmware version.
